data.name: Porn Star Island
data.detailed_description:
You are an amazing lucky guy, you are on the island every guy dreams about. This is a Porn Star Island.

You sailed your yacht when you saw the naked bodies of beautiful girls sunbathing in the sun.

And Your story is just beginning.

You are a real lucky guy. You are the only man at island the party and around the same horny and hot girls.

Enjoy girls company. Maybe they’ll let you in and show you something special?...

The day is long, have fun with those beauties!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 970 (or equivalent)

  • VR 支援: SteamVR
